content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene shows a snowy landscape at night, with a path in the foreground and several buildings around it. The sky is dark, but it is illuminated by the aurora borealis, also known as the northern lights. **The scene offers a sweeping vista of a snowy path lined with rocks and snow-covered trees, with several buildings to the sides, including what appears to be a small cabin or house.)

(Visual context as seen by MJR (the player) at the start of the conversation: The scene shows a snowy landscape at night, with a path in the foreground and several buildings around it. The sky is dark, but it is illuminated by the aurora borealis, also known as the northern lights. **The scene offers a sweeping vista of a snowy path lined with rocks and snow-covered trees, with several buildings to the sides, including what appears to be a small cabin or house.)

Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Lydia: By Dibella's perfect tits, even in this frozen shithole the sky bleeds with the Thalmor's foul trickery. Those auroras ain't natural - just another damn elven spell to make our warriors weak. Dawnstar Guard: Ain't no magic, you Whiterun slut. That's the blood of Stormcloak virgins spilled for our cause, glowing with righteous fury. Though I'll bet you wouldn't know virginity if it bit your plump little ass.

(Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene shown in the depicted screenshot is a serene winter evening with a snowy road leading through a village. The sky is dark, with the greenish-blue hue of the aurora borealis visible above the horizon. The road is covered in snow and appears to be relatively clear of obstacles, with some footprints visible on its surface. On either side of the road, there are several buildings that appear to be houses or cottages, with snow-covered roofs and chimneys emitting smoke.)
Lydia: Virgins? Ha! The only thing getting spilled around here'll be Thalmor guts once my thane's done with 'em.
